peerBenchmarks.metricName: System Average Interruption Duration Index (SAIDI) — Hours
CO2 Emissions per Tonne of Copper (tCO2e/t)

bestPractices.title: Integrated Reporting Framework
bestPractices.description: Adoption of the International Integrated Reporting Framework (<IR>) for SOE annual reports, combining financial and non-financial performance.
bestPractices.implementationGuide: Adopt <IR> framework for FY2025 annual reports. Training for finance and communications teams required.
bestPractices.expectedBenefits: Improved transparency, better stakeholder engagement, higher ESG ratings.

bestPractices.title: Dividend Policy Framework
bestPractices.description: Formalised dividend policy requiring SOEs to pay a minimum 25% of net profit as dividend to the state, with exceptions for capital-intensive investment periods.
bestPractices.implementationGuide: Develop and gazette formal dividend policy. Embed in performance contracts.
bestPractices.expectedBenefits: Predictable government revenue. Improved capital allocation discipline.

rankings.rationale: Improved copper production volumes and stronger balance sheet.
Improved governance disclosures and board diversity.

gapAnalyses.gap: IDC lacks a real-time portfolio monitoring system. Data is collected manually on a monthly basis.
gapAnalyses.currentState: Manual monthly data collection via spreadsheets
gapAnalyses.targetState: Real-time digital dashboard with automated data feeds from portfolio companies
gapAnalyses.rootCause: Legacy IT systems. Insufficient IT budget allocation historically.
gapAnalyses.recommendedActions: Implement portfolio management software. Mandate API data feeds from portfolio companies.

gapAnalyses.gap: ZESCO's SAIDI of 48.2 hours is significantly above the regional average of 28.5 hours.
gapAnalyses.rootCause: Aging transmission and distribution infrastructure. Insufficient maintenance budget.
gapAnalyses.recommendedActions: Accelerate T&D rehabilitation programme. Implement predictive maintenance.
